feature: Enterprise Agent Platform Sprint 3: Enterprise dev process upgrades

tasks.title: Enhanced design doc templates (Alternatives Considered + Cross-Cutting Concerns)
tasks.description: Add two new sections to commands/design-doc.md: 'Alternatives Considered' (options evaluated with trade-offs) and 'Cross-Cutting Concerns' (security, observability, testing, deployment, error handling).

tasks.title: SMURF test classification in /generate-tests
tasks.description: Add SMURF (Smoke, Mutation, Unit, Regression, Functional) test classification taxonomy to commands/generate-tests.md. Each generated test gets a SMURF tag. Summary shows counts per category.

tasks.title: 3-gate code review in /check
tasks.description: Upgrade the code-reviewer agent in commands/check.md from a single pass to a 3-gate review: Gate A (Correctness), Gate B (Ownership/maintainability), Gate C (Readability). Each gate produces independent findings.

tasks.title: Feature flag system (/flag command)
tasks.description: Create commands/flag.md — a new skill for managing feature flags. Subcommands: create, enable, disable, list. Flags stored in a flags.json file. Integrates with code via a simple isEnabled() pattern.

tasks.title: Amazon PR/FAQ step in /brainstorm
tasks.description: Add a PR/FAQ (Press Release / FAQ) step to commands/brainstorm.md after the brief is written. Generates a fake press release and anticipated FAQs to pressure-test the feature idea (Amazon's Working Backwards method).

tasks.title: Enhanced /post-mortem with Google SRE template
tasks.description: Upgrade commands/post-mortem.md to use the Google SRE post-mortem template: add Detection section, add Recurrence Assessment, add Support/Communication section, enhance Action Items with bug tracking integration.
